display_name: The FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] model delivers state-of-the-art image generation results with unprecedented prompt following, photorealistic rendering, flawless typography, and image editing capabilities. Se
description:
The FLUX.1 Kontext [pro] model delivers state-of-the-art image generation results with unprecedented prompt following, photorealistic rendering, flawless typography, and image editing capabilities. Send a prompt to generate an image, or send an image along with an instruction to edit the image. 

Optional parameters:
Set the aspect ratio for text-to-image-generation. Available aspect ratio (21:9, 16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16, & 9:21)
